caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and grey over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting, facing toward the left. He is adorned with gold chains around his neck. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Behind him, a white wall features a vertical layout of five stars and the words "GRINDSET HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, a dark background displays the large text "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks. A red and white logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is overlaid on the bottom corners of the scene. His shirt also features the legible phrase "CHECK IT!".
